raw.message: Think you're a true wordsmith? Solve challenging crosswords daily and train your brain!

hook.summary: Solving a food-themed crossword puzzle by dragging letters to complete a word.
hook.visual_action: Letters are dragged into slots to complete the word 'DONUT' next to a donut icon, triggering a visual reward.

scene_flow: Crossword puzzle displayed with 'TACO' already filled and food icons as clues.
Player drags letters 'D', 'O', 'N', 'U', 'T' into the middle row to match the donut icon.
The word 'DONUT' is completed, triggering a large donut graphic and sparkle effects.
The puzzle remains with 'DONUT' filled and remaining letters 'G R' at the bottom.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle players who enjoy word games and food-themed visual rewards.
